calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-232 DA-modulated representational expansion -- CLOUD confirmation of 766 (SD-024 cloud-authoritative gate)
items.note: Cloud-class re-run of the identical, unchanged 766 diagnostic script (no copy; machine_class stamped at runtime). SD-024 (docs/architecture/sd_024_da_modulated_rbf_density.md) makes the CLOUD PASS the authoritative MECH-232 gate; the Mac 766 run (DLAPTOP-4.local) PASSed but its machine_class cannot serve the cloud gate -- so GOV-REUSE-1 does NOT apply (the decisive readout must be produced on cloud class, not reused from the Mac manifest). Pinned to ree-cloud-2 (not 'any') to avoid the Mac winning the landing race. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. NOT a supersession (confirms, does not correct). On PASS: /failure-autopsy adjudicate then /governance promote MECH-232 candidate->provisional.
